## Type of Change
<!-- Mark with 'x' -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ✅ Test improvement

- [ ] UI Components
- [ ] Page Layouts
- [ ] Global Styles/Theme
- [ ] State Management (Context)
- [ ] Utilities/Helpers

### Test Coverage
- **Before:** X%
- **After:** Y%

## Code Quality Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guide
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Code commented where necessary
- [ ] No console.log() or System.out.println() left in code
- [ ] No hardcoded values (use configuration)
- [ ] Error handling implemented properly
- [ ] Logging added at appropriate levels

## Documentation Checklist
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] API documentation updated (Swagger/OpenAPI)
- [ ] Javadoc/JSDoc added for public methods
- [ ] Architecture documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Migration guide created (if breaking changes)

## Security Checklist
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed (passwords, API keys, etc.)
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] SQL injection prevention (if applicable)
- [ ] XSS prevention (if applicable)
- [ ] Authentication/authorization handled correctly
- [ ] Dependencies scanned for vulnerabilities

## Performance Considerations
- [ ] No N+1 query problems
- [ ] Appropriate caching implemented
- [ ] Database indexes added (if needed)
- [ ] API response times acceptable
- [ ] Memory usage acceptable

## Database Changes
- [ ] Migration scripts created
- [ ] Migration scripts tested
- [ ] Rollback scripts created
- [ ] Database documentation updated

## Checklist Before Merge
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline passing
- [ ] Code reviewed by at least 2 reviewers
- [ ] All comments addressed
- [ ] Branch is up to date with main
- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] Tests are passing
- [ ] Documentation is complete

**Reviewer Guidelines:**

- Verify tests are comprehensive
- Ensure documentation is complete
- Validate security considerations
- Test locally if significant changes
